capabilities.description: Profile API endpoints, build times, and component render performance to identify bottlenecks
Identify and remove dead code, unused imports, stale dependencies, and redundant patterns
Prioritize and fix tech debt items from CLAUDE.md Section 19 and codebase audit
Measure department delivery speed: task completion rate, avg resolution time, blocker frequency

skills.description: Run next build and report compilation time, bundle size, and type check duration
skills.returns: { buildTime: number, typeCheckTime: number, warnings: number }

skills.description: Scan for unused exports, unreferenced files, and stale imports
skills.returns: { unusedExports: string[], unreferencedFiles: string[], staleImports: string[] }
